name: Douglas Mattress
introText: The Douglas Mattress is a Canadian foam mattress with a 120-night trial and 15-year warranty at $699 CAD (Queen) — the best value mattress from a Canadian brand.
whatWorks: Longest trial and warranty at this price — 120 nights (vs. Endy's 100) and a 15-year warranty (vs. 10) make the Douglas the lowest-risk mattress purchase in Canada.
Medium-firm feel suits back and stomach sleepers better than most foam mattresses — slightly firmer than the Endy, which is the better choice for those who prefer a firmer surface.
worthKnowing: Medium-firm is firmer than average — side sleepers with shoulder or hip pressure points may find the Douglas less comfortable than medium-feel alternatives.
Brand recognition is lower than Endy — Douglas is owned by GoodMorning.com; quality is comparable but customer support infrastructure is smaller.

commonComplaints.title: Too firm for strict side sleepers
commonComplaints.body: The medium-firm feel causes shoulder and hip pressure for dedicated side sleepers. Side sleepers should try the Endy Original (medium) instead.

commonComplaints.title: Less brand awareness than competitors
commonComplaints.body: Douglas doesn't have Endy's marketing footprint — fewer user reviews make it harder to research comprehensively before buying.

commonComplaints.title: Edge support is average
commonComplaints.body: Like all foam mattresses, the Douglas compresses at the edge. Not a significant issue for most sleepers.

verdict: The Douglas Mattress is the best value Canadian mattress — $176 less than the Endy Original with a longer trial and warranty. If you prefer medium-firm over medium, the Douglas is the right choice. Side sleepers should consider the Endy Original instead.

realBuyers.quote: Best mattress I've ever bought and I've owned five. The medium-firm keeps my back happy.
Canadian company, fast delivery, and the price is unbeatable. Sleep better than on any hotel mattress.
120 nights trial is great — didn't need it because I loved it immediately, but the peace of mind helps.

metaDescription: Douglas Mattress review: foam, medium-firm, 120-night trial, 15-year warranty. $699 CAD (Queen). Best budget Canadian mattress.
